## Meeting Purpose

[Debrief on candidate Viviane and align on AI screening criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Offer Viviane:** The team will extend an offer to Viviane, who is the strongest candidate so far. Her deep SEO knowledge and calm, confident demeanor are a strong fit for a client-facing role.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Address Learning Gaps:** Viviane will need coaching on AEO (AI-Enabled Optimization), adapting to a fast-paced environment, and improving attention to detail.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [**Standardize AI Screening:** The team defined a three-tier AI framework (Basic, Curious, Native) to standardize candidate evaluation and ensure new hires can be trained efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Recruiting Policy:** Bridget clarified that internal recruiters can contact candidates from an employee's previous company to avoid non-poaching agreement violations.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Topics

### Viviane Candidate Debrief

  - [**Strengths:**](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Deep SEO Knowledge:** Strong technical background; William noted he would have hired her for a technical role.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [**Strong Client Presence:** Personable, confident, and calm demeanor.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [**Team-Oriented:** Expressed interest in building team rapport, which would be a valuable addition to the sprint cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Areas for Development:**](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**AEO Knowledge:** Limited experience; must be open to learning, as clients increasingly lead with AEO.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
      - [**Adaptability:** Needs to prove effectiveness in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with imperfect processes.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [**Attention to Detail:** Presentation showed formatting issues and was read word-for-word.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Client-Facing Experience:** May require coaching on managing varied client meetings and timelines.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Defining AI Screening Tiers

  - [The team defined a three-tier framework to standardize candidate evaluation, prompted by differing assessments of Viviane's "AI native" skills.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [**AI Basic:** Uses LLMs for simple tasks like research and writing.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
      - [*Example:* Using ChatGPT as a search engine.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [**AI Curious:** Actively explores AI to solve problems, even if unsuccessfully.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [*Example:* Attempting to automate a manual workflow, showing initiative beyond basic use.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [**AI Native:** Builds advanced, multi-tool AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
      - [*Example:* George's "men's relationship app," which uses multiple models and agents.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The framework helps assess a candidate's potential for rapid upskilling, which is critical given GrowthX's advanced AI culture.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William & Marília:** DM to finalize Viviane's offer details.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [**Marília:** Schedule Viviane's closing call to confirm location for geocomp.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [**Marília:** Schedule Steph's interview for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/BskSgaGLyQgDi7364QansYxkFXzNKxCx?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
